CVE-2018-12581.title: An issue was discovered in js/designer/move.js in phpMyAdmin befo ...
CVE-2018-12581.summary: An issue was discovered in js/designer/move.js in phpMyAdmin before 4.8.2. A Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability has been found where an attacker can use a crafted database name to trigger an XSS attack when that database is referenced from the Designer feature.

CVE-2018-19968.title: An attacker can exploit phpMyAdmin before 4.8.4 to leak the conte ...
CVE-2018-19968.summary: An attacker can exploit phpMyAdmin before 4.8.4 to leak the contents of a local file because of an error in the transformation feature. The attacker must have access to the phpMyAdmin Configuration Storage tables, although these can easily be created in any database to which the attacker has access. An attacker must have valid credentials to log in to phpMyAdmin; this vulnerability does not allow an attacker to circumvent the login system.

CVE-2018-19969.title: phpMyAdmin 4.7.x and 4.8.x versions prior to 4.8.4 are affected b ...
CVE-2018-19969.summary: phpMyAdmin 4.7.x and 4.8.x versions prior to 4.8.4 are affected by a series of CSRF flaws. By deceiving a user into clicking on a crafted URL, it is possible to perform harmful SQL operations such as renaming databases, creating new tables/routines, deleting designer pages, adding/deleting users, updating user passwords, killing SQL processes, etc.

CVE-2018-19970.title: In phpMyAdmin before 4.8.4, an XSS vulnerability was found in the ...
CVE-2018-19970.summary: In phpMyAdmin before 4.8.4, an XSS vulnerability was found in the navigation tree, where an attacker can deliver a payload to a user through a crafted database/table name.

CVE-2018-7260.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in db_central_columns.ph ...
CVE-2018-7260.summary: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in db_central_columns.php in phpMyAdmin before 4.7.8 allows remote authenticated users to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via a crafted URL.

CVE-2019-12616.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.9.0. A vulnerabili ...
CVE-2019-12616.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.9.0. A vulnerability was found that allows an attacker to trigger a CSRF attack against a phpMyAdmin user. The attacker can trick the user, for instance through a broken tag pointing at the victim's phpMyAdmin database, and the attacker can potentially deliver a payload (such as a specific INSERT or DELETE statement) to the victim.

CVE-2019-12922.title: A CSRF issue in phpMyAdmin 4.9.0.1 allows deletion of any server  ...
CVE-2019-12922.summary: A CSRF issue in phpMyAdmin 4.9.0.1 allows deletion of any server in the Setup page.

CVE-2019-19617.title: phpMyAdmin before 4.9.2 does not escape certain Git information,  ...
CVE-2019-19617.summary: phpMyAdmin before 4.9.2 does not escape certain Git information, related to libraries/classes/Display/GitRevision.php and libraries/classes/Footer.php.

CVE-2019-6798.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.8.5. A vulnerabili ...
CVE-2019-6798.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.8.5. A vulnerability was reported where a specially crafted username can be used to trigger a SQL injection attack through the designer feature.

CVE-2019-6799.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.8.5. When the Allo ...
CVE-2019-6799.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin before 4.8.5. When the AllowArbitraryServer configuration setting is set to true, with the use of a rogue MySQL server, an attacker can read any file on the server that the web server's user can access. This is related to the mysql.allow_local_infile PHP configuration, and the inadvertent ignoring of "options(MYSQLI_OPT_LOCAL_INFILE" calls.

CVE-2020-10802.title: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL inject ...
CVE-2020-10802.summary: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL injection vulnerability has been discovered where certain parameters are not properly escaped when generating certain queries for search actions in libraries/classes/Controllers/Table/TableSearchController.php. An attacker can generate a crafted database or table name. The attack can be performed if a user attempts certain search operations on the malicious database or table.

CVE-2020-10803.title: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL inject ...
CVE-2020-10803.summary: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL injection vulnerability was discovered where malicious code could be used to trigger an XSS attack through retrieving and displaying results (in tbl_get_field.php and libraries/classes/Display/Results.php). The attacker must be able to insert crafted data into certain database tables, which when retrieved (for instance, through the Browse tab) can trigger the XSS attack.

CVE-2020-10804.title: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL inject ...
CVE-2020-10804.summary: In phpMyAdmin 4.x before 4.9.5 and 5.x before 5.0.2, a SQL injection vulnerability was found in retrieval of the current username (in libraries/classes/Server/Privileges.php and libraries/classes/UserPassword.php). A malicious user with access to the server could create a crafted username, and then trick the victim into performing specific actions with that user account (such as editing its privileges).

CVE-2020-22452.title: SQL Injection vulnerability in function getTableCreationQuery in  ...
CVE-2020-22452.summary: SQL Injection vulnerability in function getTableCreationQuery in CreateAddField.php in phpMyAdmin 5.x before 5.2.0 via the tbl_storage_engine or tbl_collation parameters to tbl_create.php.

CVE-2020-26934.title: phpMyAdmin before 4.9.6 and 5.x before 5.0.3 allows XSS through t ...
CVE-2020-26934.summary: phpMyAdmin before 4.9.6 and 5.x before 5.0.3 allows XSS through the transformation feature via a crafted link.

CVE-2020-26935.title: An issue was discovered in SearchController in phpMyAdmin before  ...
CVE-2020-26935.summary: An issue was discovered in SearchController in phpMyAdmin before 4.9.6 and 5.x before 5.0.3. A SQL injection vulnerability was discovered in how phpMyAdmin processes SQL statements in the search feature. An attacker could use this flaw to inject malicious SQL in to a query.

CVE-2021-21252.title: The jQuery Validation Plugin provides drop-in validation for your ...
CVE-2021-21252.summary: The jQuery Validation Plugin provides drop-in validation for your existing forms. It is published as an npm package "jquery-validation". jquery-validation before version 1.19.3 contains one or more regular expressions that are vulnerable to ReDoS (Regular Expression Denial of Service). This is fixed in 1.19.3.

CVE-2022-0813.title: PhpMyAdmin 5.1.1 and before allows an attacker to retrieve potent ...
CVE-2022-0813.summary: PhpMyAdmin 5.1.1 and before allows an attacker to retrieve potentially sensitive information by creating invalid requests. This affects the lang parameter, the pma_parameter, and the cookie section.

CVE-2022-23807.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 4.9 before 4.9.8 and 5.1 be ...
CVE-2022-23807.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 4.9 before 4.9.8 and 5.1 before 5.1.2. A valid user who is already authenticated to phpMyAdmin can manipulate their account to bypass two-factor authentication for future login instances.

CVE-2023-25727.title: In phpMyAdmin before 4.9.11 and 5.x before 5.2.1, an authenticate ...
CVE-2023-25727.summary: In phpMyAdmin before 4.9.11 and 5.x before 5.2.1, an authenticated user can trigger XSS by uploading a crafted .sql file through the drag-and-drop interface.

CVE-2025-24529.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 5.x before 5.2.2. An XSS vu ...
CVE-2025-24529.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 5.x before 5.2.2. An XSS vulnerability has been discovered for the Insert tab.

CVE-2025-24530.title: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 5.x before 5.2.2. An XSS vu ...
CVE-2025-24530.summary: An issue was discovered in phpMyAdmin 5.x before 5.2.2. An XSS vulnerability has been discovered for the check tables feature. A crafted table or database name could be used for XSS.

CVE-2025-3573.title: Versions of the package jquery-validation before 1.20.0 are vulne ...
CVE-2025-3573.summary: Versions of the package jquery-validation before 1.20.0 are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in the showLabel() function, which may take input from a user-controlled placeholder value. This value will populate a message via $.validator.messages in a user localizable dictionary.

CVE-2020-5504.summary: In phpMyAdmin 4 before 4.9.4 and 5 before 5.0.1, SQL injection exists in the user accounts page. A malicious user could inject custom SQL in place of their own username when creating queries to this page. An attacker must have a valid MySQL account to access the server.
